## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   └── capybara_v0.1.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   ├── qwen_2.5_vl_7b.safetensors
│   │   └── byt5_small_glyphxl_fp16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── hunyuanvideo15_vae_fp16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 clip_vision/
│       └── sigclip_vision_patch14_384.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/zh-CN/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud ship stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Sampler Setting
widgets_values:
| Parameter | Inference Script (Default) | ComfyUI (Default) |
 |-----------|---------------------------|-------------------|
 | **Steps** | 50 | 20 |
 | **CFG** | 4.0 | 6.0 |
> 💡 **Tip:** For better quality results, consider using **50 steps** instead of the default 20  steps in ComfyUI.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: blurry, low quality, distorted, ugly, watermark, text

Lenovo UltraReal for ZIT
https://civitai.com/models/1662740?modelVersionId=2452071

z_skin_detail by kayte0342
https://huggingface.co/kayte0342/z_image_loras/blob/main/z_skin_detail.safetensors

You are the top art director; I need some inspiration to create stunning images using Flux.
I need the text prompt from your inspiration idea with the following structure: Subject+Scene+Action

Here is the instruction:
The subject includes humans, animals, or any imagined subject
The scene includes the environment in which the subject is located, including the foreground and background, and can be a real scene or an imagined fictional scene
Actions include the movement state of the subject or non subject, which can be small, large, delicate, or partial movements, or overall movements
